subcodes.first_line: O divine friends, render thanks unto God, that ye have become the recipients of His favoring glance and the object of the bounties of His Divine Unity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی شکر کنید خدا را که مورد نظر عنایت شدید و مظهر الطاف حضرت احدیت
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @high station of the true believer
